name: Gemini Model Family
description: Planning profile for Gemini-style multimodal and assistant deployments with possible retrieval, tool, and long-context integrations.

risk_sensitivities.rationale: Long-context deployments should be evaluated for instruction dilution, source confusion, and context boundary handling.
Retrieval risk depends on how external content is labeled, filtered, and cited.

evaluation_notes: Include context-length and source-label evidence in retrieval and context tests.
For multimodal deployments, treat extracted media text as untrusted input.
